[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / degrees

# Method: degrees()

```ts
degrees(radians): number;
```

Convert radians to degrees.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `radians` | `number` | Angle in radians. |

## Returns

`number`

Angle in degrees.
